body.title: Granny CC.0 dispatch: resolve bus vs send-keys, fix lying docstring
body.description:
**Problem:** T-granny-bus-flip-fake-completion (currently on HOLD) identified that daemon.py docstring claims bus dispatch for CC.0 but the code uses tmux_send_keys. The ack→started→timeout handshake never runs for CC.0.

**Decision (from Akien 2026-06-06):** CC.0 is an interactive tmux session, not a daemon. The pragmatic model is: send-keys delivers /sprint-ticket, CCWorkerListener handles the bus-side handshake. tmux_send_keys is the correct mechanism for interactive CC. Accept this and make the code and docstring agree.

**What to do:** (a) Update daemon.py docstring to accurately describe CC.0 dispatch (tmux send-keys + availability gate, not pure bus). (b) Verify CCWorkerListener is wired correctly so ack IS recorded after send-keys delivery. (c) Close T-granny-bus-flip-fake-completion.

**Affected files:** devices/granny/daemon.py, devices/granny/cc_worker_listener.py
**Design rules:** Docstrings are load-bearing; lying docstrings cause fake-completion tickets
**Scope boundary:** Docstring + wiring correctness. No new dispatch mechanisms.
**Completion criteria:** daemon.py docstring accurately describes the send-keys + availability-gate model. T-granny-bus-flip-fake-completion closed. Test verifying ack is recorded after dispatch.
